history.content: Done — the proposal execution is complete. ### What was changed - **File modified:** `src/gateway/agents-runtime/subagent-executor.ts` - Updated the `send_telegram` screenshot flow so it now: 1) captures the desktop screenshot first, then 2) performs packet/readiness checks against that captured artifact. ### Why this matters - Fixes the ordering bug where checks could run **before** capture and cause false failures. - Makes screenshot sending behavior deterministic and aligned with expected flow. ### Verification - Build was run successfully (`npm run build`). - No additional files were created. - No other source files were changed. ### Outcome `send_telegram` screenshot delivery now correctly captures before validation/check logic, resolving the approved proposal target.
